_comment_: This file is reference-only. The real genesis is produced by scripts/init-genesis.sh inside the container, which calls `junod init` + `junod genesis add-genesis-account` + `junod genesis gentx`. The JSON below documents the shape a reviewer should expect in /root/.juno/config/genesis.json after init completes.

wasm._comment_wasm_: Permissions are wide open because this is an ephemeral devnet. Do NOT copy these parameters into a real chain genesis.

gov._comment_gov_: Short voting period so the benchmark loop can also exercise a mock governance proposal in < 1 minute.
